heading: View X.509 Certificates for a Database User
body:
To list all Atlas-managed, unexpired certificates for a database user using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas dbusers certs list <username> [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas dbusers certs list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-dbusers-certs-list).**Api:**Atlas Administration APITo view Atlas database users using the
Atlas Administration API, see [Get All](atlas/reference/api-resources-spec/v2).**Ui:**Atlas UITo view Atlas database users and X.509 certificates in the
Atlas UI:
